nasb.text: If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me, And the light around me will be night,”

esv.text: If I say, “Surely the darkness shall cover me, and the light about me be night,”

cnv.text: 如果我說：“願黑暗遮蓋我， 願我周圍的亮光變成黑夜。”

ccb.text: 我想，黑暗一定可以遮蔽我， 让我四围变成黑夜。

csbs.text: 就算我说：“黑暗必然覆盖我， 我周围的亮光也必变为黑夜”，
